'''tavufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiberscopy|fiberscopy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiberscopy|fiberscopy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tavufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || tævifith || tævifij || tævifish || tævifi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || tavuvufuth || tavuvufuj || tavuvufush || tavuvufu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || tavufuth || tavufuj || tavufush || tavufu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || tavuffufth || tavuffufj || tavuffufsh || tavuffuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tavufuthu || tavufuju || tavufushu || tavufuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || tavufuth || tavufuj || tavufush || tavufu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tavufuthul || tavufujul || tavufushul || tavufukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tavufuuthuthu || tavufuujuju || tavufuushushu || tavufuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || tavufuthun || tavufujun || tavufushun || tavufukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tavufuthuoro || tavufujuoro || tavufushuoro || tavufukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
